title: Arai Climax X Silver Metallic

specs.material: Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) with Arai's proprietary EPS and Carbon Fiber Reinforced Shell
specs.strap_type: Adjustable Double D-Ring with Quick-Release Buckle

technical_analysis: The Arai Climax X represents a pinnacle of aerodynamic engineering, utilizing computational fluid dynamics (CFD) to minimize drag and reduce wind buffeting at high speeds. The shell construction employs a multi-density EPS liner combined with a carbon-fiber-reinforced composite that offers superior impact absorption while maintaining an exceptionally low center of gravity. This structural integrity is further enhanced by the integrated MIPS system, which allows for rotational movement during oblique impacts, significantly reducing the risk of traumatic brain injury compared to traditional single-density liners.
marketing_description: Experience the ultimate fusion of performance and style with the Arai Climax X in a striking Silver Metallic finish. Designed for the discerning rider who demands uncompromising safety without sacrificing aesthetics, this helmet features a sleek, aggressive profile that cuts through the air with precision. The sophisticated silver metallic paint job adds a touch of luxury to your ride, making it a standout piece on any motorcycle.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Climax X Silver Metallic full-face helmet. Featuring advanced MIPS technology, ECE 22.06 certification, and superior aerodynamics for high-speed performance.
